pgj         2010-01-12 22:13:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/hs-datetime    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This Haskell library provides several utilities for easily converting
  among the various standard library Date and Time types, and for
  converting between these and standard external representations.
  
  WWW: http://hackage.haskell.org/package/datetime
  
  PR:             ports/142565
  Submitted by:   Jacula Modyun <jacula(at)gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3773    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +75 -0     ports/devel/hs-datetime/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/hs-datetime/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/hs-datetime/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/devel/hs-datetime/pkg-plist (new)
